summary: HotelDetailsView Component Testing COMPLETE. All required features verified: hotel details display (name, star rating, address, description, image gallery), rating breakdown section, 'What to Know' section with highlights, room categories with select buttons, 4 working tabs (AVAILABLE OPTIONS, DETAILS, ROOMS, LOCATION), back button returning to hotel list, and room selection updating Trip Builder correctly. End-to-end flow tested: Login → Create Trip Package (Dubai) → Trip Builder → Add Hotel → Hotel Selection Modal → HotelDetailsView → Room Selection → Trip Builder with selected hotel.

minor.issue: Console warning: Date format 'Mon, 02 Mar 2026' does not conform to required format 'yyyy-MM-dd' for date picker inputs

issues: React hydration warning about '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - cosmetic issue from Emergent preview framework, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: HotelDetailsView.jsx correctly imports and uses all required components (ImageGallery, RatingBreakdown, WhatToKnow, RoomCategory, SearchBar)
TripBuilder.jsx correctly imports HotelDetailsView at line 12 and uses it in HotelSelectionModal at lines 291-299
Hotel city filtering works correctly - only Dubai hotels shown when Dubai is selected as destination
Room selection flow properly updates parent Trip Builder state via onSelectRoom callback
All tabs (AVAILABLE OPTIONS, DETAILS, ROOMS, LOCATION) are functional with proper content

context_for_next_testing_agent: HotelDetailsView component fully tested. All features work: hotel name/star rating/address/description display, image gallery with thumbnails, rating breakdown (cleanliness/service/comfort/location/amenities), What to Know section with highlights, search bar with date/room/nationality filters, 4 tabs (AVAILABLE OPTIONS/DETAILS/ROOMS/LOCATION), room categories with expandable sections, room cards with pricing and select buttons. Room selection properly updates Trip Builder with full hotel details. Test user: testuser@example.com / password123
